title: Suki Gifts International Yomiko Classics Dogs Plush Toy, Small Boxer
availability_text: Only 14 left in stock (more on the way).
features: Suki Gifts International - Small Sitting Dog, Boxer (12135)
Suki Classics are the most realistic animal creations at affordable prices in a true celebration of Nature's workmanship. Collect them all.
Part of the Suki Classics lifelike animals collections
description: Product Description Super soft plush small Boxer toy from Suki Gifts International’s Classics Dog collection. Premium quality soft boa plush dog with realistic features, soft fur and airbrushed details. Classics offer a broad collection of realistically styled animals. Measures at around 5 inches (12.7 cm) high. Suitable for all ages. Hand wash and air dry. Other sizes and friends also available in the Classics range of sitting and lying Cats, Dogs and Jungle animals. Please remove all tags before giving this to a child. Suki Gifts are an innovative British company, providing high quality gifts and soft toys Directions Please remove all tags before giving to a child Box Contains 1x Plush See more
